concerns.text: SC-001 states: 'The predictive model's AUC-ROC is measured against the baseline of a random classifier and the target of, using the held-out validation set...' The phrase 'and the target of,' is grammatically incomplete and missing the specific target value (e.g., 0.85) which is defined in FR-002 and US-2. While the intent is clear, the success criteria text itself is broken.
